name: Graphic Design Services Agreement
description: A contract between a freelance designer and a client covering the scope of design work, revisions, payment, and intellectual property rights.
content:
GRAPHIC DESIGN SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Graphic Design Services Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and between the Designer and the Client named below.

1. THE PARTIES

Designer: {{designer_name}}, Address: {{designer_address}}, Email: {{designer_email}}

Client: {{client_name}}, Address: {{client_address}}, Email: {{client_email}}

2. SCOPE OF PROJECT

The Designer agrees to provide the following graphic design services (the "Project") for the Client:

{{project_scope}}

Materials to be Provided by Client: {{client_materials}}

3. DRAFTS, REVISIONS, AND DELIVERY

The initial draft(s) will be delivered to the Client by: {{formatDate draft_delivery_date}}.

The Client is entitled to {{revision_rounds}} rounds of complimentary revisions based on the initial drafts. The Client must provide feedback within {{feedback_days}} days of receiving the drafts.

Upon final approval, the Designer will deliver the final files in the following format(s): {{final_formats}}, within {{final_delivery_days}} days of approval.

4. COMPENSATION AND PAYMENT

The total fee for the Project is {{total_fee}}.

Payment Schedule: {{payment_schedule}}

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY AND USAGE RIGHTS

{{#if (eq copyright_transfer 'Yes')}}

Work Made for Hire / Full Transfer: Upon full payment of the total fee, the Designer agrees to transfer and assign all copyright, ownership, and intellectual property rights of the final approved designs to the Client.

{{else}}

License Granted: The Designer retains the original copyright to the designs. Upon full payment, the Designer grants the Client a {{license_scope}} license to use the final approved designs.

{{/if}}

The Designer warrants that the designs are original and do not infringe upon the intellectual property of any third party, or that appropriate licenses have been acquired for any stock assets used.

Portfolio Rights: The Client {{#if (eq portfolio_use 'Yes')}}grants the Designer permission to display the final work in their portfolio, website, and social media for promotional purposes.{{else}}does NOT grant the Designer permission to display the work in their portfolio.{{/if}}

6. CANCELLATION

If the Project is canceled by either party before completion, the following policy applies: {{cancellation_policy}}

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.

DESIGNER
{{designer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

CLIENT
{{client_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: project_scope
fields.label: Project Scope / Description
fields.placeholder: e.g., Logo design (3 concepts), Brand guidelines, Business card design.

fields.name: client_materials
fields.label: Materials Provided by Client
fields.placeholder: e.g., Brand colors, Text copy, Inspiration images.

fields.name: final_delivery_days
fields.label: Days to Deliver Final Files After Approval

fields.name: payment_schedule
fields.label: Payment Schedule
fields.placeholder: e.g., 50% upfront deposit, 50% upon final delivery.

fields.name: copyright_transfer
fields.label: Will Copyright be Transferred to Client?

fields.name: portfolio_use
fields.label: Can Designer use the work in their portfolio?

fields.name: cancellation_policy
fields.label: Cancellation Policy
fields.placeholder: e.g., The upfront deposit is non-refundable if canceled by Client.
